name: arb-policies-skillset
description: Pull-mode pipeline for arb-policies: Document Intelligence Layout skill cracks the blob AND semantically chunks it (section-aware boundaries, text output), an AOAI chat skill categorizes each chunk, an AOAI embedding skill vectorizes each chunk, and index projections emit one chunk per index document.

skills.name: layout-and-chunk
skills.description: Document Intelligence layout-aware extraction + semantic chunking. outputFormat=text + chunkingProperties means `pages` is an array of objects whose `content` is layout-aware text chunked at section/paragraph boundaries (no mid-sentence cuts). chunkingProperties only works with text output (the API rejects markdown + chunkingProperties together). Billed via the cognitiveServices attachment below (foundry-cc-canada multi-service AI Services account qualifies).

skills.name: categorize-chunk
skills.description: Assign each chunk a canonical PolicyCategory. Prompt is rendered from agents.categories.CATEGORIZE_SYSTEM_PROMPT; build_indexer.py substitutes the prompt at deploy time so the on-the-wire skillset stays byte-stable.

skills.name: embed-chunk
skills.description: Vectorize each chunk via the Foundry embeddings deployment. text-embedding-3-large is native 3072 dims.

cognitiveServices.description: Billing target for the Document Intelligence layout skill + the chat-completion skill. Defaults to FOUNDRY_ENDPOINT (foundry-cc-canada multi-service AI Services account).
